goal: Close the retired, broken /today/ orphan page by redirecting it to the homepage (BUG-010)
done: Replaced /today/ and /th/today/ with instant client-side redirects (meta refresh + location.replace; GitHub Pages has no server-side 301s) — EN -> /, TH -> /th/index.html, noindex,follow + canonical to target. Removed both /today/ URLs from sitemap.xml.
symptom: meowtarot.com/today/ was unscrollable: body overflow:hidden + fixed 100vh, and a 280x600 card image filled the viewport, clipping the streak + card-meaning content below the fold with no way to reach it.
root_cause: Dead Phase-4 page; the bottom-nav 'Today' tab was rerouted to the homepage (9c1231b) leaving /today/ reachable only by direct URL, and its fixed-height overflow:hidden layout was never updated for the long card.
fix: Per founder decision, redirect rather than fix the layout. Client-side redirect stubs (meta http-equiv refresh content=0 + window.location.replace), noindex, canonical to the homepage; sitemap entries dropped.
verified: chrome-devtools-mcp localhost: /today/ lands on /, /th/today/ lands on /th/index.html
served HTML contains meta refresh + location.replace + canonical to target
notes: Old today/index.html (data-page='daily', today.js, supabase block) fully replaced. Mirror sync (www/ios) deferred — pre-existing drift (BUG-015); web serves canonical.
